description: A vertical graphic. The right side shows a photograph of a woman wearing a telephone headset, resting her chin on her hand with a concerned expression. A blue panel on the left holds white text reading If you're the victim of a crime linked to immigration, we're here to HELP. A white band at the bottom holds the phone number 1-855-48-VOICE and ICE.GOV/VOICE beside a blue V logo and the words VOICE, Victims of Immigration Crime Engagement.
notable_text: If you're the victim of a crime linked to immigration, we're here to HELP; 1-855-48-VOICE; ICE.GOV/VOICE; VOICE; Victims of Immigration Crime Engagement
